description: You are preparing an expedition briefing for a Mount Everest summit push. Configure Stellarium for the summit (27.9881° N, 86.9250° E, 8848m) on May 22, 2024, starting at 20:00 UTC. Set the display to show the atmosphere, landscape, azimuthal grid, and cardinal points, ensuring constellation lines and labels are disabled. Document the lunar illumination at the start of the climb and the sunrise time with screenshots (saved to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/). Save your configuration settings. Create a briefing document at /home/ga/Desktop/summit_briefing.txt including the location, date, moon phase at the start, and the observed UTC time of sunrise.

metadata.data_source: Geographic coordinates of Mount Everest; May 2024 Full Moon ephemeris
